summary: Replay Engine Dynamic Signal Re-Evaluation - All 15 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified. The new DYNAMIC signal mode correctly re-evaluates signals against configurable thresholds (zscore_min, delta_ratio_min, ofi_threshold per regime). STATIC mode maintains legacy behavior. eval_stats response includes all required fields (total_evaluated, dynamic_accepted, dynamic_filtered, static_fallback, session_filtered, by_source). Frontend shows signal mode toggle, threshold grids, and eval_stats display correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns signal_mode field (DYNAMIC/STATIC)
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns zscore_min with all 5 regimes (COMPLACENCIA, BULL, BEAR, TRANSICAO, CAPITULACAO)
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns delta_ratio_min with all 5 regimes
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns ofi_threshold with all 5 regimes
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns rr_min_atr_mult
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns require_volume_significance (boolean)
✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns session_start_hour and session_end_hour
✅ POST /api/replay/run with signal_mode=DYNAMIC returns eval_stats with all required fields
✅ POST /api/replay/run with signal_mode=DYNAMIC has dynamic_accepted > 0 with relaxed thresholds
✅ POST /api/replay/run with signal_mode=STATIC maintains legacy behavior (no dynamic re-evaluation)
✅ POST /api/replay/run with relaxed thresholds (zscore_min TRANSICAO=0.1, delta_ratio_min TRANSICAO=0.01) generates MORE accepted signals
✅ POST /api/replay/run with ultra-strict thresholds (zscore_min TRANSICAO=5.0) generates FEWER/ZERO accepted signals
✅ POST /api/replay/run with require_volume_significance=true filters more signals than false
✅ eval_stats has complete structure: total_evaluated, dynamic_accepted, dynamic_filtered, static_fallback, session_filtered, by_source
✅ Session filter (session_start_hour, session_end_hour) reduces signals when active
✅ Frontend: Signal mode toggle (DYNAMIC/STATIC) works correctly
✅ Frontend: Threshold grids (Z-Score, Delta Ratio, OFI) show 5 regime columns each
✅ Frontend: Threshold grids hidden when STATIC mode selected
✅ Frontend: R:R min ATR mult input present
✅ Frontend: Volume Significance toggle present
✅ Frontend: Session filter inputs (start/end hour) present
✅ Frontend: eval_stats badge shows in header after replay execution
✅ Frontend: eval_stats panel shows detailed breakdown (Avaliados, Aceitos, Filtrados, Fallback, by_source)
critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic signal re-evaluation implementation is complete and well-structured
extract_raw_signals() correctly handles 3 data sources: n2_signal (enriched), dz_n2 (intermediate), legacy_parse (regex from n3.reason)
reevaluate_signal() correctly applies per-regime thresholds for Z-Score, Delta Ratio, and OFI
TRANSICAO regime correctly handles rejection logic (VAH→SELL, VAL→BUY) with R:R viability check
Frontend ConfigPanel correctly shows/hides threshold grids based on signal_mode
eval_stats tracking is comprehensive with by_source breakdown

test_credentials.note: Used for API and frontend tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live v3_snapshots collection (776+ snapshots, 108 actionable signals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replay Engine Dynamic Signal Re-Evaluation fully tested. Key new features: signal_mode (DYNAMIC/STATIC), zscore_min/delta_ratio_min/ofi_threshold per regime, rr_min_atr_mult, require_volume_significance, session_start_hour/session_end_hour. eval_stats response includes total_evaluated, dynamic_accepted, dynamic_filtered, static_fallback, session_filtered, by_source. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_replay_dynamic_signal.py. MongoDB: v3_snapshots has 162 enriched n2_signal, 394 dz_n2 levels, 356 legacy (parsed from n3.reason). All TRANSICAO regime.

feature_verification.GET /api/replay/defaults - new fields: Working - returns signal_mode, zscore_min, delta_ratio_min, ofi_threshold, rr_min_atr_mult, require_volume_significance, session_start_hour, session_end_hour
feature_verification.POST /api/replay/run signal_mode=DYNAMIC: Working - re-evaluates signals against thresholds, returns eval_stats
feature_verification.POST /api/replay/run signal_mode=STATIC: Working - uses original snapshot actions, no dynamic re-evaluation
feature_verification.Relaxed thresholds generate more trades: Working - zscore_min TRANSICAO=0.1, delta_ratio_min TRANSICAO=0.01 accepts more signals
feature_verification.Strict thresholds generate fewer trades: Working - zscore_min TRANSICAO=5.0 filters most signals
feature_verification.require_volume_significance filter: Working - true filters more signals than false
feature_verification.eval_stats structure: Working - all required fields present with correct types
feature_verification.Frontend signal mode toggle: Working - DYNAMIC/STATIC toggle shows/hides threshold grids
feature_verification.Frontend threshold grids: Working - Z-Score, Delta Ratio, OFI grids with 5 regime columns each
feature_verification.Frontend eval_stats display: Working - badge in header, detailed panel with by_source breakdown

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All replay tests use live endpoints and MongoDB.
